ast.name: error
ast.source: RememberScrollposition: No access to codemirror instance available, thus cannot retrieve necessary information to save scroll position. Exiting.
ast.target: RememberScrollposition: 无法访问 codemirror 实例，因此无法检索保存滚动位置所需的信息。正在退出。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: RememberScrollposition: restoreScrollposition was called with invalid parameters.
ast.target: RememberScrollposition: restoreScrollposition 使用了无效参数调用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scroll instantly to saved position upon loading a note
ast.target: 加载笔记时立即滚动到已保存位置

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure how many days a scroll position should be applied before considered outdated. Leave empty to disable age check.
ast.target: 配置滚动位置在被视为过时前应应用的天数。留空以禁用时间检查。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Max age needs to be set to a positive number.
ast.target: 最大保留时间需要设置为正数。
